summary: Completed testing of CSV Import and PDF Import features (Iteration 9). All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. CSV import flow works correctly: upload CSV -> preview with Nou/Actualizare badges -> confirm import. PDF import flow works correctly: upload PDF -> parse -> show extracted items with product matching dropdown. Admin-only buttons are correctly hidden for casier role.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

Backend: GET /api/products/csv-template requires admin role (403 for casier)
Backend: GET /api/products/csv-template returns CSV file with correct headers
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv requires admin role
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv rejects non-CSV files
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv parses valid CSV and returns preview
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv handles semicolon delimiter
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv rejects CSV without required columns
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv/confirm requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv/confirm requires admin role
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv/confirm rejects empty items
Backend: POST /api/products/import-csv/confirm creates new products
Backend: POST /api/nir/parse-pdf requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/nir/parse-pdf requires admin role
Backend: POST /api/nir/parse-pdf rejects non-PDF files
Backend: POST /api/nir/parse-pdf returns correct response structure
Backend: Full CSV import flow (upload -> preview -> confirm -> verify)
Frontend: Products page shows 'Template CSV' button (admin only)
Frontend: Products page shows 'Import CSV' button (admin only)
Frontend: Products page shows 'Adaugă Produs' button (admin only)

Frontend: Stock page shows 'Intrare Marfă (NIR)' button (admin only)
Frontend: CSV Import dialog opens on file upload

Frontend: CSV Import dialog shows 'Nou' badges for new products
Frontend: CSV Import dialog shows 'Importă X produse' confirm button

Frontend: NIR dialog opens correctly

Frontend: Casier role does NOT see Template CSV button
Frontend: Casier role does NOT see Import CSV button

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 CSV/PDF Import features fully tested. Key points: (1) GET /api/products/csv-template downloads CSV template with correct headers. (2) POST /api/products/import-csv parses CSV and returns preview with items, action (create/update), and existing_id for updates. (3) POST /api/products/import-csv/confirm executes the import. (4) POST /api/nir/parse-pdf parses PDF invoices and extracts items with product matching. (5) All import buttons are admin-only (hidden for casier). (6) CSV supports both comma and semicolon delimiters. (7) PDF parsing extracts invoice_number and supplier_name from text.

csv_template_download.returns: CSV file with headers: Denumire, Categorie, Cod Bare, Pret Achizitie, Pret Vanzare, TVA %, Unitate, Stoc, Stoc Minim
